     the Fermi energy is     2.5227 ev

!    total energy              =   -8218.68505650 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          2.1E-09 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.27138702 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =   -8218.41366948 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -240486.81420750 Ry
     hartree contribution      =  121129.87970579 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -3160.83188402 Ry
     ewald contribution        =  114301.32375224 Ry
     DFT-D3 Dispersion         =      -1.97103599 Ry

     total magnetization       =    33.43 Bohr mag/cell
     absolute magnetization    =    36.40 Bohr mag/cell

     convergence has been achieved in  40 iterations

     negative rho (up, down):  1.793E-03 1.587E-03
